description: CompositionPurple round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton, with chest printWash care Light machine wash Do not bleach warm iron on reverse Do not dry clean Dry flat/reverse Do not scrub FittingComfort FitIf you are a globe trotter and love to collect souvenirs from every place you visit, then here's the perfect t-shirt for you from inkfruit's collection. Pair this with denims and sneakers from the wide collection available at myntra and flaunt your love for travel.
